title: adenia globosa subsp. curvata
intro: Adenia globosa subsp. curvata, also known as the "thorny passionflower," is a plant species that belongs to the Passifloraceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, Adenia globosa subsp. curvata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or taken in supplement form.
